prerequisites: An active AppFollow account with API access enabled.
An AppFollow API Key (the value entered into the connector's `api_secret` field, described by AppFollow as the "API Key provided by Appfollow").

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: AppFollow authenticates with a single API key. Provide it in the connector's `api_secret` field (titled "API Key"). The connector sends it on every request to the AppFollow API v2 (base URL https://api.appfollow.io/api/v2) using the `X-AppFollow-API-Token` HTTP header.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your AppFollow API Key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your AppFollow account and locate the API Key issued for your account (the "API Key provided by Appfollow"). This single key authenticates all API v2 requests.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the AppFollow API Key into the connector's `api_secret` field (shown as "API Key"). This is the only credential the connector requires; it is stored as a secret. No other configuration fields are required.

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: Save and run a connection check. The connector calls the AppFollow API v2 with the key in the `X-AppFollow-API-Token` header; a successful check confirms the key is valid.
